name: Animation Control
description: Play/stop animation clips and set animation parameters on target objects.
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Animation Control

Play/stop animation clips and set animation parameters on target objects.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `action` | Action | `enum` | `play` | `Play` (`play`), `Stop` (`stop`), `Set Param` (`set_param`) |
| `clipName` | Clip Name | `string` | `` | - |
| `loop` | Loop | `boolean` | `true` | - |
| `timeScale` | Time Scale | `number` | `1` | - |
| `paramName` | Param Name | `string` | `` | - |
| `paramType` | Param Type | `enum` | `number` | `Number` (`number`), `Boolean` (`boolean`), `String` (`string`) |
| `paramValue` | Param Value | `string` | `` | - |
